title: Bard (RPG Series Plus)
description: Motivate and strengthen the party with awesome song's and ballads! Spell Engine Add-On
body:
# ![Bard Icon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1536/870/bard-png.png) # **🎶Motivate and strengthen the party with awesome song's and ballads!** ***  [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/loader-neoforge|fabric-black?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/modrinth-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcemaster-rpg-class)  [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1209063880790376468?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&label=discord&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://discord.com/invite/AShKd5XrTu) [![KoFi](https://img.shields.io/badge/donations-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://ko-fi.com/fichteee) [![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&labelColor=black&color=grey)](https://github.com/ProfessorFichte/Bards) *** # **📂 Installation** *** ### **🚨Required Mods** * [Spell Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spell-engine) * [More RPG Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-rpg-classes) * [Azure Lib Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/azurelib-armor) ### **👍Highly Recommended Mods** * [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus) *** # **🕹️ Features** The Bard is a supporting and enhancing class, that brings the other party-members and himself to a whole other level, by buffing and enhancing their stats. ## **✨Spells** Make use of the new Bard Spells to make fighting and combat more fun, by equipping a Spell Book and unlocking all of its powerful spells! To do it, find a Spell Binding Table in village [Gazebos](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gazebos), or build your own (just don't forget bookshelves around the Spell Binding Table). To use the spell books: equip them and hold a weapon (vanilla, or even third party mods). **Bard's Stories** This spell book offers supporting spells, enhancing buffs and minor heals, making the Bard a welcomed ally in your party. ## 🤺Combat & Equipment * Craft new instruments, to play Songs & Ballads * Craft new fast attacking Rapier's * Use the Bard's Garb's to move faster to stay close to you allies! ## ⚙️Configuration
  • Armor & Weapon bonuses:
  • _config/bards_rpg/items.json
  • Tweaks:
  • _config/bards_rpg/tweaks.json
  • Status Effects:
  • config/bards_rpg/effects.json
## **🤝Mod Compability**
  • BetterEnd
  • BetterNether
  • Armory
## 🎥 Showcases

Thanks to all content creators for showcasing my Mod😊!

 

# **🙌Credits**

 

  • Deadelus for creating the amazing Spell Engine API
  • Slepykat for creating some effect visuals!
  • Damienbrittan for creating the awesome Mod Banner!
  • SirGaith for creating the Weapon & Armor Assets
  • Emil for creating the Spell Icons
*** ### **🧙‍♂️Check out my other RPG themed Mods!** [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/709/archers_expansion_275-png-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers-expansion)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/710/berserker_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/berserker-rpg-class)[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/711/elemental_wizards_275-png-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elemental-wizards-rpg-class) [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1370/713/witcher_mod_275-png-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/witcher-rpg-class) *** ## **Want to play more RPG content? Check out the RPG Series Mods created by Daedelus!** [![Archers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/169/archers_full_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers)[![Paladins](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/170/paladins_full_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paladins-and-priests)[![Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/171/wizards_full_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wizards)[![Rogues](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/899/332/rogues_full_bg_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rogues-and-warriors)[![Jewelry](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/760/387/jewelry_full_275.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jewelry)[![Relics](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/296/relics_275-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/relics-rpg)[![Arsenal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1103/295/arsenal_full_275-png.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/arsenal-rpg-series)[![Armory](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/866/armory_275-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/armory-rpg-series)[![Skill Tree](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1311/865/skilltree_275-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skill-tree) *** ## **Check out more RPG-Content created by other Spell Engine Dev's** [![Anarchy](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1358/177/anarchy-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rpg-minibosses-forsaken-adventurers)[![Mercenaries and Artificers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1346/857/merc_275-png.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mercenaries-and-artificers)[![Death Knigths](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/953/998/death_knights_275_2.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/death-knights)
